description: DP4+/MM-DP4+ parameter table extracted from DP4+App 2.1.3. The scoring semantics are chemical-shift domain: unscaled shifts are computed as sigma_reference - sigma_sample, then scaled per DP4+App.

DP4+/B3LYP/6-31G(d).notes: Extracted from DP4+App parameter workbook; n/m/s rows are Student-t error model parameters.

13C.formula: delta_scaled = per-isomer linear regression of delta_unscaled against experimental shifts (DP4+App semantics)

1H.formula: delta_scaled = per-isomer linear regression of delta_unscaled against experimental shifts (DP4+App semantics)
